markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review HubSpot's automated renewal process and documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Automated Renewal Creation:** HubSpot auto-creates a renewal deal for "Growth Execution" SOWs upon "Closed Won," tracking the new contract and serving as the opportunity for the next renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**90-Day Activation:** Deals auto-move to "Renewal Prep" 90 days out, triggering Slack alerts. Subsequent stage moves are manual to ensure data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Data Integrity Fix:** Slack alerts failed because the `Slack channel internal` property was set to an external channel. The fix is to update this property to an internal channel (e.g., `INT-customer-name`).](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Data Cleanup Required:** Leah will audit and update historical deals missing required fields (e.g., `Contract End Date`) to ensure future renewal deals are created correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

## Topics

### The Renewal Process: Automation & Pipeline

  - [**Goal:** Automate renewal tracking and opportunity creation.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Trigger:** "Closed Won" deals with an SOW of "Growth Execution."](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [*Rationale:* Excludes one-off "Strategy Sprints" that don't renew.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**Creation:** A new renewal deal is auto-created.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - **Naming:** `[Original Deal Name] - Renewal #[Number]`.
      - [**Data Copy:** Key info from the original deal is copied (e.g., `Prior Amount`, `Prior ARR`) to provide context for the renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Activation:** At 90 days out, the deal auto-moves to "Renewal Prep," triggering a Slack alert.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Pipeline Stages:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**Renewal Prep:** 90+ days out (auto-triggered).](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Scope & Options:** 60–31 days out (manual).](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - **[Proposal:](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)** \<30 days out (manual).
      - [**Closed Won:** Creates the *next* renewal deal.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Closed Lost:** Requires a reason.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Manual Stage Movement:** Prevents inaccurate data. A deal 12 days out might still be in "Renewal Prep," reflecting its true status.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Data Integrity & Reporting

  - [**Required Fields:** Several fields are required to close a deal, ensuring data quality for automations.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [`Deal Owner`, `Amount`, `Contract Start Date`, `Contract End Date`, `Term`, `Term (number of months)`, `SOW`.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Historical Data Cleanup:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Problem:** Older deals lack required fields, causing issues like the "Lovable" renewal missing a `Contract End Date`.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Solution:** Leah will audit and update these deals. Missing info can be found on the associated original deal or in the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [**Slack Notification Fix:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Problem:** Alerts for the 90/60/30-day milestones were not firing.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [**Cause:** The `Slack channel internal` property was set to an external channel.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Fix:** Update the property to an internal channel (e.g., `INT-customer-name`). The system is hard-coded to ignore external channels as a safeguard.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Pipeline Visualization:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [**Deal Tags:** Auto-applied at 90, 60, 30 days out, and "Past Due" for at-a-glance status.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [**Filtered Views:** Pre-built views (e.g., "30-day renewals") to focus on specific cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Renewal Dashboard:** Provides a high-level summary of upcoming renewals by quarter, stage, and risk.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Known Issues & Future Topics

  - [**Data Grid Renewal Failure:** A renewal deal was not auto-created after the July deal was "Closed Won" in November. Kyle will investigate the workflow failure.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Line Item Pricing:** Andi noted the logic is complex. Kyle explained it's due to a mismatch between GrowthX's billing cycles and the actual contract term. A follow-up call is available if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Leah:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
      - [Audit and update historical deals with missing required fields.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [Review documentation and Loom videos; follow up with questions.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Investigate why the "Data Grid" renewal deal was not created.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Fix the "30-day renewals" filtered view.](https://fathom.video/share/p5gNA5ot_eEoY7fyBCi4yEco-P9sBT33?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
